title: Telipogon bergoldii
taxonomy: Telipogon bergoldii is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Telipogon and family Orchidaceae. The genus Telipogon is further classified under the subfamily Drakaeoideae. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant. The classification also aids in the identification and categorization of the plant within the larger group of orchids.
